title: ROSHIELD 2 X Humane MOUSE Traps for Indoors and Outdoors, Duty Pest Trap for Catch Alive. Pets and Children Friendly. Reusable Rodent Mice Trap. Quick, Effective and Highly Sensitive Catcher
features: DUAL TRAPS, FAMILY-SAFE DESIGN: More affordable than professional pest control, this metal-free trap creates less mess and is designed for safe use around children and pets, eliminating the risks associated with traditional methods

HUMANE & EFFICIENT CAPTURE MECHANISM: Engineered to catch mice alive and without harm, our traps feature numerous air holes for enhanced bait scent dispersion, offering a quick, effective, and non-harmful solution that prioritizes animal welfare. Roshield traps are humane rodent control solution designed to safely and effectively capture rodents without causing harm.

EASY TO SET-UP & RELEASE: Just lift the bait door, fill it up with your chosen lure that Mr. mouse find it as irresistible. Once the bait's set, lower the door and then set the other spring mounted door. Enter Mr. Mouse, lured to the end of the trap by the tempting treat. He steps on the sensitive pedal, and voilà—the door snaps shut behind him! Now he's all set for a safe trip at least two miles away, full and unharmed.

ECO-FRIENDLY & REUSABLE: Durable and reusable, this trap is an environmentally conscious choice, reducing waste & the need for multiple purchases, designed for repeated use offering both cost-effectiveness and sustainability benefits.

EASY TO CLEAN: Designed for simple cleaning, ensuring hygiene and effectiveness for repeated use without the risk of disease transmission. Don’t forget to use gloves before releasing the mouse and always wear gloves while handling and cleaning traps for personal safety.

VERSATILE INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE WITH WEATHER RESISTANCE: Our traps are equally effective indoors and outdoors, thanks to its durable construction that withstand various weather conditions, ensuring reliable performance in any setting. Remember to check your trap regularly , and make sure everyone in the house know where traps are placed.
description: Product Description The human mouse trap works by luring mice with bait and using a one-way door mechanism to trap them inside. The trap is designed to be safe and humane, as it does not harm the moue in any way. Once caught, the mouse can be safety released into the wild, away from human and animal contact. It's important to clean traps regularly to maintain their effectiveness and to ensure that no diseases are transmitted from any captured rodents. Always wear gloves while handling and cleaning traps for personal safety. Remember to check your trap regularly. Set reminders on your phone, and make sure everyone in the house know where they are placed. When releasing the rodent wear heavy gloves and long-sleeved clothing, and release the rodent at least 3 miles away from residential areas. See More
